meaning: n.进口,入口,水湾,小港,插入物
examples: By selecting a group of suitable entrance parameters, a submerged inlet with the trapezoid entrance on the plane surface is designed and verified.
TC1 is mounted directly on the pump inlet tee replacing the convectron gauge shown on the diagram.
Upon inquiry, he learnt that the inn was near an inlet.
Sailing through this inlet reveals a huge freshwater lagoon, shimmering aqua green in the sun.
Chevron, for instance, decided recently to dump its holdings in the Cook Inlet area.
